productDisplayName: Nike Men Black T-Lite Sports Shoes
description: Style Note The nike T-Lite X SL shoes are a great combination of support and durability. These training shoes offer all-around support, cushioning and durability to meet the demands of core performance. You can also team these with jeans and a tee for a great casual wear option. Product Details Leather upper for durability and comfort Perforations on the toe box, sides and heel counter for breathability Cushioned collar and tongue for plush comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit and to lock the foot in place Appliquéd swoosh logo on the side to create a style statement Full-length Phylon midsole for lightweight cushioning Phylite and solid rubber outsole for excellent traction on a variety of surfaces Flex grooves for flexibility and natural movement of the feet Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash Remove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
